ops.text: RESULTS E36 — CLOSED, VERIFY-confirmed (independent own-code DeLong reproduced every number; ettin probs are real trained outputs — 777 unique, no NaN). VERDICT: encoder is a BETTER gate architecture but the frozen frame NARROWLY can't certify it over the incumbent — the campaign's instrument-limited thesis, a 3rd time. Numbers: Ettin-150m AUC 0.7643 (winner), ModernBERT 0.7526, both > incumbent 0.7161 / TF-IDF 0.7182 / probe 0.7083 pointwise. Ettin vs incumbent: Δ +0.04818, 95% CI [+0.0139, +0.0825] (EXCLUDES 0, significant), frame MDE 0.04906 → |Δ| < MDE by 0.00088 → actionable=FALSE (a razor-thin frame-MDE miss, NOT a seed or model issue). Ettin actionably BEATS the probe floor (Δ +0.056, |Δ|≥MDE). Win sign is ~6σ_train robust (σ_train=0.008); folding seed variance in quadrature keeps the CI excluding 0 → the +0.048 win is real, only its CERTIFICATION over the incumbent is blocked by frame sampling error (se_delta 0.0175 >> σ_train). 3-seed variance run SKIPPED (formality: can't flip a frame-limited verdict; win already 6σ). DeBERTa-v3 = failed-diverged (NaN on MPS at lr 2e-5; non-essential). SetFit near-chance 0.540. HANDOFF: Ettin-150m is a promising gate-recipe candidate (a small 150m encoder beats the sklearn/TF-IDF-level production gate by +0.048); it CANNOT be certified on the current n=1325 frame — needs a larger/cleaner gate frame (E30.2-style enrichment) or the live-monitor path to cross the actionability line. Do not ship on the frozen frame; hand to 162a5dc as a candidate contingent on instrument work. Artifacts: E36/out/{results.json, report.md, probs/}, verify2/.
